content: Need to set up an automation: take new contact form submissions, score each one for whether it's a real lead vs spam/garbage, and route the real leads to one bucket and the spam to another. Score on the LLM block — give it the message text plus the email domain so it can spot the obvious junk. Real leads go to high_quality_leads.jsonl, spam goes to dropped.jsonl. Trigger this on every batch we get — we're pulling them out of HubSpot once a day for now.
